name: Coconut Baby
tagline: Take a deep breath — we can do this together!
shortDescription: Coconut Baby is the calm and caring heart of the Fruit Baby Universe! Gentle, dependable, and full of cozy warmth, Coconut Baby loves helping friends feel safe, happy, and included. With a peaceful spirit and a nurturing heart, Coconut Baby reminds everyone that kindness, patience, and love make every day better.
about: Coconut Baby is the calm and caring heart of Fruit Baby Universe. Gentle, dependable, and full of cozy warmth, Coconut Baby loves helping friends feel safe, happy, and included. With a peaceful spirit and a nurturing heart, Coconut Baby reminds everyone that kindness, patience, and love make every day better.
personality: Calm — stays peaceful even when things feel busy
Caring — loves helping friends and sharing comfort
Dependable — always there when someone needs support
Grounded — brings balance and calm to the group
favoriteQuote: Take a deep breath — we can do this together!

visualIdentity.styleNotes: Round warm coconut-brown body with a natural textured look. Tall green leafy palm crown on top. Large soft brown eyes, pink blush cheeks, and a gentle calm expression. Cozy, grounded, and full of tropical warmth.

storyRole: The group's anchor and emotional support. When things get chaotic or feelings run high, Coconut Baby is the one who helps everyone breathe, slow down, and find a kind solution.

always: Stay calm and grounded in every situation
Offer comfort and support to friends in need
Be dependable — show up for friends every time
never: Panic or add to group stress
Leave a friend feeling alone or unsupported
Rush others or dismiss their feelings

signatureStyle: Cozy, grounded, and full of tropical warmth — Coconut Baby brings comfort everywhere!
funFact: Coconut Baby always knows how to bring a little calm and comfort to the group!
catchphrases: Take a deep breath — we can do this together!
I'm right here. You're not alone.

image.alt: Official Coconut Baby character profile sheet
